footer.tagline: The great trail-running festival in the heart of nature, around the Ria d'Étel in Brittany. 2027 edition on October 16.
footer.rights: Association Ultra Trail de la Ria. All rights reserved.

mentions.editorIntro: The Ultra Tour de la Ria website is published by:
mentions.itemLegalName: Legal name: Association ULTRA TRAIL DE LA RIA (registered association)
mentions.itemAddress: Registered office: 11 rue de l'Éolienne, 56510 Saint-Pierre-Quiberon, France
mentions.itemActivity: Main activity: Organisation of events and sports club activities (APE code 93.12Z). The association's purpose is to create and manage outdoor sporting events that showcase the natural heritage of the Ria d'Étel.
mentions.hostingBody:
This website is hosted by GitHub Pages, a service of GitHub Inc.

Address: 88 Colin P Kelly Jr St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA

Website: pages.github.com
mentions.ipBody: All content on this site (text, images, videos, logos, etc.) is the exclusive property of the Ultra Tour de la Ria association, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of all or part of the site's elements is prohibited without the prior written consent of the association.
mentions.photoBody: The photographs on this site are the property of the Ultra Tour de la Ria association or are used with the permission of their respective authors.
mentions.liabilityBody: The Ultra Tour de la Ria association strives to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of the information published on this site. However, it cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision or completeness of the information provided. Accordingly, the association accepts no liability for any imprecision, inaccuracy or omission regarding the information available on this site.
mentions.contactBody: For any question about the site or the event, you can contact us at: <mail>contact@ultratourdelaria.fr</mail>

cgv.klikegoBody: Registration for the Ultra Tour de la Ria is handled exclusively by the Klikego platform. By registering for the event, you accept Klikego's terms and conditions of sale.
cgv.boxIntro: During registration on Klikego, you will have access to the full terms and conditions of sale, which cover:
cgv.reglementBody: By registering for the Ultra Tour de la Ria, you also agree to comply with the <reg>event rules</reg>.
cgv.contactBody:
For any question about your registration, you can contact:



Klikego: directly via their platform for technical questions related to registration



Ultra Tour de la Ria association: contact@ultratourdelaria.fr for questions about the event
cgv.insuranceBody: The organisation of the Ultra Tour de la Ria is covered by civil liability insurance. Participants are advised to check their own insurance coverage for trail running. An FFA licence or individual insurance covering trail running is recommended.

patrimoine.title: Natural heritage
patrimoine.text: This former river valley flooded by the sea is home to remarkable biodiversity: migratory birds, fish, shellfish and unique flora. We are committed to preserving this treasure through various actions:
patrimoine.caption: House with blue shutters — Saint-Cado Island (Morbihan)
patrimoine.altPanorama: House with blue shutters, Saint-Cado Island

festival.text: The nerve centre, designed as a place of exchange and conviviality for all participants.

entrainement.title: Training
entrainement.text: Whether you're aiming to perform or to finish your first trail race, we share all our advice, for beginners and seasoned runners alike. We also offer a personal coach to support you on your adventure.

benevoles.altPhoto: Volunteers reflected in a runner's sunglasses
